SEQUENCE.COMMENT: translateEOL - translate content1 to content9 switching LF=>CRLF or CRLF=>LF
6/18/24 - added support for ENCODING (ie, simplified chinese is GB2312), defaults to UTF-8 (see PymtFromSAPToAsiaFinance-Citi)

INVOKE.COMMENT: EOL_CONVERSION OPT_CONTENT_IN OPT_CONTENT_OUT ENCODING OPT_ENCODING_IN OPT_ENCODING_OUT

MAP.COMMENT: set sEncodingIn=sEncoding (if null) and sEncodingOut=sEncoding (if null)

INVOKE.NAME: sEolConversion == ''
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0590 EOL_CONVERSION parameter is required - please provide an EOL_CONVERSION component parameter, set to either LF2CRLF or CRLF2LF

Values.value: FE0590 EOL_CONVERSION parameter is required - please provide an EOL_CONVERSION component parameter, set to either LF2CRLF or CRLF2LF
